claim: Tier 7.7n scored the locked attribution matrix and classified the 7.7l gain as generic_projection_explains_gain: the full partitioned driver remained useful versus single-pool, but same-feature random projection and nonlinear/lag unpartitioned controls explained or exceeded the gain.
caveat: Diagnostic scoring evidence only; not a mechanism promotion, not a baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, not external-baseline superiority, and not broad public usefulness evidence.
